summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Shever Technical corporate website. All core functionality tested including public pages, admin authentication, contact forms, mobile responsiveness, and backend APIs. Website is fully functional and ready for production use.
passed_tests: All 20 backend API endpoints working (100% success rate)
Home page loads with hero section, services overview, and CTA sections
Logo displays correctly in navigation and footer
All navigation links work (Home, Services, Projects, About, Contact)
Services page displays all 9 services with detailed descriptions, benefits, and problems solved
Projects page loads successfully (empty state as expected for new site)
About page displays company overview, core values, and service areas
Contact form submission works and saves to database
Contact page displays contact information and Google Maps embed
WhatsApp floating button is visible and clickable
Admin login works with credentials admin@shever-tech.com / admin123
Admin dashboard displays statistics after successful login
Footer displays complete company information and quick links
Mobile responsive navigation with hamburger menu works perfectly
All CTA buttons are functional (Call Now, WhatsApp, Request Quote)
Contact form validation and success notifications work
Google Maps integration displays correctly
Mobile viewport responsive design works well
All form fields accessible and functional in mobile view
Backend-frontend integration working seamlessly
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (20/20 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all core features working)
